ab: Da na mɨ ka iké tarima na ico.
en: There are five people in our family.

ab: Da na mɨ iké taturu na le ma ta ketaka.
ch: 我們家有三個兄弟姊妹。
en: There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ab: Kɨkɨ si mama, nina, kaka sovlé, kaka abéya teresɨ kɨ namɨ.
ch: 我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥和姊姊住在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: Iky ni mama dane ka u teldredrekane nema pusobaka.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Rukai language with us at home.

ab: Isasɨdra name ki buburanemɨ ka abɨrɨ kɨnamɨ sɨviri cɨkɨlɨ.
en: We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: kɨkɨ si kaka sovlé kaka abéya amua namɨ puara tkorpangɨ
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.

ab: Sakura kɨkɨ madalamɨ thɨkadang namɨ na ico.
en: I like our family very much.
